commands.review_summary:
The PR defers post-turn hooks until source delivery drains, adds durable/isolated post-turn job handling, cleans up one-shot Codex CLI harness resources, and adds broad Telegram guest-mode/final-delivery recovery plus Docker Compose overlays.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runtime reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection does give a clear reproduction path for the PR-introduced hook bug: register two agent_end or llm_output handlers from one plugin and the isolated worker will run all matching handlers for each scheduled registration.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the branch mixes broad product and security-sensitive changes, has a concrete hook-isolation bug, and lacks sufficient real Telegram proof.

target.title: Stabilize post-delivery hooks and CLI liveness
target.author: marketozk
